deviations.description: The new requirement introduces a precondition that blood analysis before surgery is only mandatory if the doctor does not authorize skipping it. The process model does not include any activity or event corresponding to 'doctor_authorizes_skipping_blood_analysis', so the process cannot satisfy the new precondition logic. This results in non-compliance with the stricter requirement.
process_model_reference: Entire process, specifically the absence of 'doctor_authorizes_skipping_blood_analysis'

deviations.description: The activity name in the requirement changed from 'blood analysis' to 'blood_analysis_test'. The process model does not contain an activity named 'blood_analysis_test', so the process cannot fulfill the new obligation as specified.
